description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single test stage containing a job named test_python37. The job runs a before_script that removes docker-compose.override.yml, sets COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME to "vaulthelpers${CI_JOB_ID}", pulls and builds the Docker Compose services with --pull. In the script it defines a shell function run_tox_tests that starts the postgres and vault services in the background, waits 10 seconds, runs tox -e "$1" inside the test service, then stops and removes containers, and then invokes this function for the environments py37-django111, py37-django220, and py37-django300. The job is tagged with docker-compose and has no explicit image, caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
